items.statcast_observation: Jac Caglianone produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 113.4 mph at a 30.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals lost to the St. Louis Cardinals, KC 2, STL 4. Jac Caglianone led the night, 2-4 | HR, RBI, R in the latest Royals game. Jac Caglianone supplied the loudest Royals contact at 113.4 mph.
items.title: Royals at Cardinals Recap
